title: A6 Composition Layer: Hybrid / Federated Anchor Composition Profile for A6 in c = a + b
description: A DOI-ready release of the A6 Composition Layer profile for the c = a + b architecture. The package formalizes A6 as an anchor-composition state over A0-A5, not a merged super-anchor, and includes final Markdown, PDF, citation metadata, release notes, QA notes, schemas, and examples. The PDFs include explicit authorship: Kotov Ivan, Bruxelles. Belgique 2026.
notes: Canonical DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20752182. DOI URL: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20752182. This research protocol does not create legal personhood, legal authority, product certification, clinical validity, public-law activation, post-anchor sovereignty, or merged identity.
